case_title: GOLDEN BAY COMERCIAL SERVICE INC. VS AMFD FAHMI DBA THE COVE CAFE.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $753.00 FILED BY GOLDEN BAY COMERCIAL SERVICE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AMFD FAHMI DBA THE COVE CAFE. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMFD FAHMI DBA THE COVE CAFE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN BAY COMERCIAL SERVICE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMFD FAHMI DBA THE COVE CAFE. $434.74 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $473.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AMFD FAHMI DBA THE COVE CAFE.

STAY OF EXECUTION ON WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AMFD FAHMI DBA THE COVE CAFE.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23718, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN BAY COMERCIAL SERVICE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMFD FAHMI DBA THE COVE CAFE. $191.35 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $230.35, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23718 ON 5-4-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AMFD FAHMI DBA THE COVE CAFE.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT AMFD FAHMI DBA THE COVE CAFE.
